---
title: "Research"
description: "Publications, working papers, and selected research projects."
---

My research examines how economic conditions and health-system design affect health, healthcare use, quality of life, and financial protection. I focus especially on Indonesia and other low- and middle-income country settings, with related work on loneliness, social isolation, and mental health.

## Themes

::: {.theme-strip}
::: {.theme-item}
**Socioeconomic inequality in health**<br>
Gradients in health outcomes, healthcare utilisation, and financial protection.
:::

::: {.theme-item}
**Healthcare access and financing**<br>
Insurance coverage, provider payment, financial barriers, stigma, and treatment gaps.
:::

::: {.theme-item}
**Mental health and social connection**<br>
Loneliness, social isolation, health utility, and healthcare use.
:::

::: {.theme-item}
**Policy evaluation**<br>
Applied empirical work on health-system reforms and public programs.
:::
:::

## Publications

::: {.source-note}
Publication list refreshed from [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=x1Dg-P8AAAAJ&hl=en&oi=ao) and cross-checked against DOI or Monash profile records where available.
:::

{{< include _content/publications.md >}}

## Working Papers

{{< include _content/working-papers.md >}}

## Other Research Projects

{{< include _content/projects.md >}}
